assertions.repair_hint: Use execute_sql or call_api before answering data questions.
Produce a SQL candidate or explicit no-SQL reason.
Choose a valid endpoint catalog candidate.
Retrieve schema context, pass unit tests, pass SQLValidator, and parse SQL before execution.
Use a known GET endpoint without unresolved path parameters.
Resolve path parameters through safe discovery or choose another endpoint.
Remove unsupported claims or render only EvidenceBus facts.
Use direct SQL evidence in the final answer.
Use required API evidence in the final answer.
Treat live_empty as endpoint/context empty, not global no-data.
Treat api_error as unavailable evidence, not no data.
